trigger_examples: plan customer/discovery interviews; who should I talk to; how many interviews; write a screener; set up continuous interviewing
notes: Planning BEFORE the conversation — learning goal, target segment, screener, recruiting source, cadence.

trigger_examples: are these good interview questions; rewrite this leading question; is this question biased; review my interview guide
notes: Diagnose and rewrite a question list or transcript; flag compliments, generalities, and hypothetical questions. Transforms the user's material in place — no template.

trigger_examples: how do I run a user interview; I freeze and start pitching; how do I get past surface answers; how do I close the interview
notes: Running the LIVE session — rapport, silence, broad-to-specific probing, asking for a real commitment. In-session guidance — no template.

trigger_examples: I did six interviews now what; how do I make sense of my interviews; how do I share what I learned; turn my notes into insights
notes: AFTER the conversation — single-interview snapshot plus cross-interview patterning that separates evidence from claims.
